payload.evidence: Implemented readable dense Done-column cards by changing board task lists to flex-column scrollers, adding a compact card minimum height, and adding Playwright desktop/mobile coverage for a 48-item Done column with readable card height, visible ID/status/title/metadata, internal vertical scrolling, and no horizontal overflow. Validation passed: npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run build; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run e2e; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run desktop:smoke; git diff --check.
payload.verify_command: env -u HARNESS_DB_PATH -u HARNESS_RUN_ID -u HARNESS_RUN_MODE sh -c 'npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run build && npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run e2e && npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run desktop:smoke && git diff --check'

payload.actions_taken: ["read Harness docs and US-070 story","identified grid task-list compression risk","changed board task list to flex scroller","added dense Done-column Playwright regression","ran build e2e desktop smoke and diff check","updated story proof"]
payload.decisions_made: ["kept US-070 UI-only with no API or backend changes","used flex-column scroller plus explicit compact minimum card height to preserve bounded readable summaries","validated with deterministic Playwright desktop and mobile layout assertions"]
payload.errors: ["initial query matrix call failed when using the contract path relative to the worktree; resolved by using the absolute copied harness.db path from the environment"]
payload.harness_friction: The worktree does not include scripts/bin/harness-cli even though AGENTS lists it first, so the run used the root binary fallback with the copied DB path from the environment.
payload.notes: Validation passed with child HARNESS_* env unset: npm web-ui build; npm web-ui e2e; npm desktop:smoke; git diff --check. No registered coverage accessibility or design-validation providers were present.
payload.task_summary: Completed US-070 readable Done-column task cards
